commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a native app locale refresh workflow and exports Control UI translation helpers for native locale artifact generation.

PR surface: Config +119, Other +126. Total +245 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: move an unchanged scanned Swift or Kotlin UI string so only `native-source.json` line metadata changes; the locale artifacts can stay clean and the workflow exits early.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This maintainer-authored draft has a protected label, a concrete workflow guard finding, and a dependency on the open base inventory PR, so author or maintainer repair is the right next step.

target.title: feat(i18n): refresh all native locale artifacts
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Native app locale work needs the same provider-backed translation process as Control UI instead of a separate manual path or a Hindi/Russian-only workflow.

## Why This Change Was Made

Reuse the existing translation client, model/provider environment, glossary prompt, batching, retries, and authenticated CI commit/rebase loop for the complete 20-locale native matrix. The workflow refreshes deterministic translation-memory artifacts under `apps/.i18n/native` whenever Android or Apple source changes, and correctly commits first-run untracked artifacts.

These artifacts are the source inventory/translation handoff for native resource migration; shipped runtime resources are wired in the Android and Apple PRs in this stack.

## User Impact

Native source inventory changes are translated through the same CI pipeline used by Control UI for Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Brazilian Portuguese, German, Spanish, Japanese, Korean, French, Hindi, Arabic, Italian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Indonesian, Polish, Thai, Vietnamese, Dutch, Persian, and Russian.

## Evidence

- `node --import tsx scripts/native-app-i18n.ts check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/native-app-i18n.test.ts`
- Workflow matrix review: 20 locales, `max-parallel: 2`, authenticated commit/rebase retry loop
- `git diff --check`

This PR is stacked on #97110 and keeps the same provider/glossary/retry process for every native locale.
target.author: vincentkoc
